meta.title: Riscodex | AI Platform for Insurance Operations

hero.eyebrow: Operational Risk, Pricing and Claims Platform
hero.title: Increase efficiency in insurance operations and find solutions for all your needs from a single point.
hero.description: We bring all stakeholders in the insurance world onto a single platform and provide AI-supported solutions for your operational processes.

live.label: Live Product
live.title: TariffEQ
live.description: Technically accurate pricing aligned with facultative earthquake tariff requirements.

demo.label: Demo Product
demo.title: Versus
demo.description: Across all lines, make the best offer decision with confidence through technical analysis and AI support.

modules.label: Product Suite
modules.title: 5+ Modules
modules.description: Risk, pricing, decision support, and operations packages.

access.label: Engagement Model
access.title: Enterprise Access
access.description: Pilot access and close operational setup with approved teams.

applications.title: Browse the modules in a sliding card layout
applications.description: This section is the first version of a horizontal product rail designed to present the product family more fluidly on the homepage. It can be swiped on mobile and navigated with controls on desktop.

tariffeq.title: TariffEQ
tariffeq.description: An active pricing engine that compares earthquake premium outputs and alternative scenarios on a single surface.

locateloss.title: LocateLoss
locateloss.description: Brings loss and damage locations into view so field-side risk becomes part of the decision process.

foresight.title: Foresight
foresight.description: Reads early risk signals and produces decision support so teams can act faster.

firewatch.title: FireWatch
firewatch.description: Strengthens the preventive decision layer by increasing visibility into fire and operational threat signals.

claimcore.title: ClaimCore
claimcore.description: Designed to make claims processes more controlled, more readable, and more standardized.

revisor.title: Revisor
revisor.description: Simplifies revision workflows by bringing review and verification into a single decision surface.

about.title: Riscodex was built to make insurance operations more visible and more manageable.
about.description_1: Instead of building complex systems, Riscodex adds smart modules to your workflow. Whether you only need premium calculation or support for the full claims process, you choose the need and we accelerate your operation.

trust.title: Accepted into ITU Cekirdek
trust.description: Riscodex is growing its insurance technology focus on a strong institutional foundation as a venture developing its product journey within the ITU Cekirdek ecosystem.

platform.title: Live product, demo product, and beta modules
platform.description: We support your full workflow from pricing to decision-making with interoperable modules. By staying away from complexity, we help you run your business in the most accurate and simplest way.

live.title: TariffEQ
live.description: An active pricing engine used for earthquake premium decisions, scenario comparison, and operational premium outputs aligned with official tariff standards.

demo.title: Versus
demo.description: Across all lines, make the best offer decision with confidence through technical analysis and AI support.

modules.description: Modules beyond the live product and demo are progressing as beta layers on the shared data backbone.

next.description: The product family advancing on a shared data model opens new use cases for adjusters and operational teams.

problem.title: Overcome the barriers slowing down insurance operations
problem.description: Manual processes and uncertainty between offers make your work harder. We simplify that process for you.

visibility.label: Technical Accuracy
visibility.title: Error-Free Premium Calculation
visibility.description: Stay fully aligned with the facultative earthquake tariff and current regulation. Eliminate manual error risk and reach the most technically accurate pricing within seconds.

manual.label: Operational Speed
manual.title: Smart Offer Comparison
manual.description: Compare policies and offers across all lines with AI in seconds. Identify the most advantageous option quickly and present the right solution to your clients without losing time.

reactive.label: Industry Know-How and Decision Support
reactive.title: Reliable Decision Mechanism
reactive.description: Combine experience with the power of data in your decisions. Manage your processes with current analysis, not backward-looking assumptions, and gain full control over operations.

solutions.title: Who does Riscodex create value for?
solutions.description: Showing exactly who we serve first and then expanding into the relevant operating layer creates a stronger story.

company.title: Insurance Companies
company.description: Insurance teams that want to run pricing, tariff compliance, and risk management with more control.

broker.title: Brokers and Agencies
broker.description: Distribution teams that want to deliver faster quotes, clearer risk analysis, and a better decision basis to clients.

industrial.title: Industrial Facilities
industrial.description: Operational teams that want to read risk earlier instead of only reporting it after the fact.

company.title: Insurance Companies
company.subtitle: Make risk and pricing operations more consistent.

capital.title: Capital protection
capital.description: Make treaty-excluded risks and accumulation effects visible earlier.

compliance.title: Tariff compliance
compliance.description: Connect the official standard directly to operational flows and reduce interpretation differences.

efficiency.title: Operational efficiency
efficiency.description: Manage claims and quote turnaround with less effort.

broker.title: Brokers and Agencies
broker.subtitle: Increase sales speed while protecting technical decision quality.

comparison.title: Smart comparison
comparison.description: Make proposals easier to read and give clients a clearer decision basis.

quote.title: Fast premium estimate
quote.description: Move faster with approximate budget and price band visibility in the first conversation.

gap.title: Underinsurance analysis
gap.description: Make client coverage gaps more visible through a data-backed narrative.

industrial.title: Industrial Facilities
industrial.subtitle: An operating surface focused on reading risk before it materializes.

warning.title: Early warning visibility
warning.description: Bring field, sensor, and remote sensing data into the same decision layer.

mapping.title: Risk mapping
mapping.description: Make site-level risk profiles more visible and support better prioritization.

continuity.title: Business continuity support
continuity.description: Activate preventive decisions earlier to reduce operational downtime.

access.title: Enterprise access and engagement style
access.description: Riscodex is not a self-serve product open to the public; it is designed for controlled access and close operational setup with selected teams.

operating_model.title: We offer operational setup, not just product access
operating_model.description: The goal is not only to show a demo, but to match the right module with the right team and establish a short pilot with a clear operating model.

discovery.label: 01 / Discovery
discovery.title: Needs map
discovery.description: The team’s workflows, data, and decision points are clarified together.

pilot.label: 02 / Pilot
pilot.title: Right module selection
pilot.description: A narrow but real working surface is set up with the right module set.

operation.label: 03 / Operation
operation.title: Close go-live setup
operation.description: Access model, output flow, and working style are established together with live usage as the goal.

footer_cta.title: Request enterprise access
footer_cta.description: Let’s evaluate the right module, team structure, and usage scenario together. The first step is a short discovery call followed by a live product walkthrough.

form.label: Business Email
form.note: Once the form is submitted, the team will contact you to evaluate your access request.
